subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the capital of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Jaipur is the capital of Rajasthan.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which is the largest palace in Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान में कौन सबसे बीजन का पहाड़ी है?
explanation_en: Amber Fort is the largest palace in Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: अमेर महाल राजस्थान में सबसी पाल
अमेर महाल राजस्थान में सबसी पाल

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which is the most famous Rajasthani folk dance?
explanation_en: Dandiya Rasa is the most famous Rajasthani folk dance.
explanation_hi: डांदिया रासा राजस्थानी फॉल्क के पसंदी डांदिया रासा
डांदिया रासा राजस्थानी फॉल्क के पसंदी डांदिया रासा

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who is the famous painter of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Shahenshah Gopal Chand is the famous painter of Rajasthan.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the queen of Maharaja Ajmer Singh?
explanation_en: Pratap Singh was the queen of Maharaja Ajmer Singh. She was also known as Man Singh.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which palace was the residence of Maharaja Man Singh?
explanation_en: Amer Fort was the residence of Maharaja Man Singh. Lal Sagar is also known as Lal Sagar.
